    P

    passwordEncoder() - Method in class com.example.milestone.config.SecurityConfig
    Creates password encoder.
    Product - Class in com.example.milestone.models
    Model representing a product that is stored in the database.
    Product() - Constructor for class com.example.milestone.models.Product
    Default constructor.
    Product(UUID, UUID, String, String, String, BigDecimal, int) - Constructor for class com.example.milestone.models.Product
    Initializes a product with specified fields.
    ProductController - Class in com.example.milestone.controllers
    Processes product page requests.
    ProductController(ProductService, UserRepository) - Constructor for class com.example.milestone.controllers.ProductController
    Creates a product controller.
    productListPage(Model, Authentication) - Method in class com.example.milestone.controllers.ProductController
    Displays list of products page for authenticated user.
    ProductRepository - Interface in com.example.milestone.repositories
    Provides the access methods for database of Product objects.
    ProductService - Class in com.example.milestone.services
    Provides business logic for product-related operations.
    ProductService(ProductRepository) - Constructor for class com.example.milestone.services.ProductService
    Creates a ProductService with the product repository.
